name: rung_40_robustness_hard_hedged_inversion_bundle
utterances: Tess has Uma as a parent.
Uma has Vero as a parent.
If X is a parent of Y then X is an ancestor of Y.
If X is an ancestor of Y and Y is an ancestor of Z then X is an ancestor of Z.
I may have rushed that second edge, so undo exactly parent(vero, uma).
What I meant is that Uma has Wren as a parent.
And Wren, in turn, is parented by Xena.
After that hedge-heavy correction, is Xena an ancestor of Tess?
